source_pr.title: planner: add more test cases for plan cache
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:
Add more test cases for plan cache.

### What is changed and how it works?
1. Add the test cases for more functions. Such as the `non-deterministic` functions and `control` functions.
2. Add the test cases for system variables.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
'None'
```

symptoms: 1. Add the test cases for more functions. Such as the `non-deterministic` functions and `control` functions. | tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select a, case when a = ? then 0 when a <=> ? then 1 else 2 end b from t order by a;';") (executor/prepared_test.go)
failure_signature: 1. Add the test cases for more functions. Such as the `non-deterministic` functions and `control` functions. | tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select a, case when a = ? then 0 when a <=> ? then 1 else 2 end b from t order by a;';") (executor/prepared_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: 1.
fix_pattern: 1. Add the test cases for more functions. Such as the `non-deterministic` functions and `control` functions. | tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select a, case when a = ? then 0 when a <=> ? then 1 else 2 end b from t order by a;';") (executor/prepared_test.go)

evidence: evidence: 1. Add the test cases for more functions. Such as the `non-deterministic` functions and `control` functions. | tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select a, case when a = ? then 0 when a <=> ? then 1 else 2 end b from t order by a;';") (executor/prepared_test.go)
